description: The first time this creature's HP reaches X or below, it becomes Stunned and loses all its Strength.
description_raw: The first time {OwnerName}'s HP reaches {Amount} or below, it becomes Stunned and loses all its Strength.

name: Poison
description: Poisoned creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Poison is reduced by 1.

name: Ringing
description: You can only play 1 card this turn.

name: Shriek
description: The first time this creature's HP reaches X or below, it becomes Stunned.
description_raw: The first time {OwnerName}'s HP reaches {Amount} or below, it becomes Stunned.

name: Shrink
description: This creature's Attacks deal 30% less damage.
description_raw: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:While {} is alive, your|{OwnerName}'s} Attacks deal {DamageDecrease}% less damage{Amount:cond:==1? next turn|>1? for the next {} turns|}.

name: Sic 'Em
description: Whenever Osty hits this enemy this turn, Summon 3.

name: Sloth
description: You cannot play more than 3 cards each turn.

name: Slow
description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives 10% more damage from Attacks this turn.

name: Smoggy
description: You can only play 1 Skill per turn.

name: Strangle
description: Whenever you play a card this turn, this enemy loses 2 HP.

name: Surrounded
description: Receive 50% more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

name: Tag Team
description: The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.

name: Tangled
description: Attacks cost an additional 1 Energy for 2 turns.
description_raw: Attacks cost an additional {Amount:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:this turn|for {} turns}.

name: Temporary Strength Down
description: Lose Strength until the end of this turn.

description: Lose Strength until the end of this turn.

description: Lose Strength until the end of this turn.

description: Lose Strength until the end of this turn.

name: Tender
description: Whenever you play a card, lose 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity this turn.

name: The Gambit
description: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.

name: Vulnerable
description: Receive 50% more damage from Attacks for X turns.
description_raw: Receive {DamageIncrease:percentMore()}% more damage from Attacks for {Amount} {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Waste Away
description: Gain 1 less Energy per turn.

name: Weak
description: Weakened creatures deal 25% less damage with Attacks.

name: Wraith Form
description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 Dexterity.
